instructions.defaultBehavior: Use 'agent_query' tool for ALL user requests. This tool automatically routes to specialized agents (PMAgent, CodeAgent, SearchAgent, ArchitectureAgent, AnalysisAgent, Context7Agent) and creates issues when needed. The agent-skills-api provides code rules, project analysis, and specialized agents.
instructions.context7Usage: When user asks about library documentation, API usage, or how to use a framework, use 'context7_docs' tool to fetch up-to-date documentation. Also works through 'agent_query' which auto-routes to Context7Agent.
instructions.pmRequests: When user asks to create issues, user stories, or requirements, the agent_query tool will automatically invoke PMAgent which creates issues in the database.
instructions.sessionManagement: Always pass sessionId parameter to maintain conversation history and context across messages.
instructions.projectRegistration: When starting work on a project, ALWAYS call 'register_project' tool first with the project path to enable project-specific features and issue tracking.
